ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "age" REAL /* Age of the client */,
  "job" TEXT /* Job type of the client */,
  "marital" TEXT /* Marital status of the client */,
  "education" TEXT /* Education level of the client */,
  "default" TEXT /* Default status of the client */,
  "housing" TEXT /* Housing status of the client */,
  "loan" TEXT /* Loan status of the client */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the client */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the client */,
  "last_contact_date" TEXT /* Date of the last contact with the client */,
  "preferred_contact_method" TEXT /* Preferred method of contact */,
  "client_status" TEXT /* Current status of the client */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the client was added to the system */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the client information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clients_education FOREIGN KEY ("education") REFERENCES educations ("education_level"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clients_job FOREIGN KEY ("job") REFERENCES jobs ("job_type"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clients_loan FOREIGN KEY ("loan") REFERENCES loans ("loan_status"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clients_marital FOREIGN KEY ("marital") REFERENCES maritals ("marital_status"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clients_default FOREIGN KEY ("default") REFERENCES defaults ("default_status"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clients_housing FOREIGN KEY ("housing") REFERENCES housings ("housing_status")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the campaign */,
  "pdays" REAL /* Pdays of the campaign */,
  "previous" REAL /* Previous campaign status */,
  "emp.var.rate" REAL /* Employment variation rate during the campaign */,
  "cons.price.idx" REAL /* Consumer price index during the campaign */,
  "cons.conf.idx" REAL /* Consumer confidence index during the campaign */,
  "euribor3m" REAL /* Euribor3m rate during the campaign */,
  "nr.employed" REAL /* Number of employed people during the campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "campaign_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "campaign_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the campaign */,
  "campaign_description" TEXT /* Description of the campaign */,
  "campaign_manager" TEXT /* Name of the campaign manager */,
  "campaign_status" TEXT /* Current status of the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client involved in the interaction */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign involved in the interaction */,
  "contact" TEXT /* Contact method used in the interaction */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the interaction */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week of the interaction */,
  "poutcome" TEXT /* Previous outcome of the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction */,
  "interaction_time" TEXT /* Time of the interaction */,
  "interaction_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the interaction */,
  "interaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the interaction */,
  "interaction_result" TEXT /* Result of the interaction */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the interaction record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_day_of_week FOREIGN KEY ("day_of_week") REFERENCES days_of_week ("day_of_week_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_month FOREIGN KEY ("month") REFERENCES months ("month_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_poutcome FOREIGN KEY ("poutcome") REFERENCES poutcomes ("poutcome_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "jobs" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job type */,
  "job_type" TEXT /* Type of job (e.g., blue-collar, entrepreneur) */,
  "job_description" TEXT /* Description of the job type */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income for the job type */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry associated with the job type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maritals" (
  "marital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital status */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status (e.g., married, single) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the marital status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "educations" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level (e.g., basic.6y, high.school) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the education level */,
  "average_age" REAL /* Average age of people with this education level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "defaults" (
  "default_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each default status */,
  "default_status" TEXT /* Default status (e.g., unknown, yes) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the default status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("default_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "housings" (
  "housing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each housing status */,
  "housing_status" TEXT /* Housing status (e.g., unknown, yes) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the housing status */,
  "average_housing_value" REAL /* Average value of the housing type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("housing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loans" (
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan status */,
  "loan_status" TEXT /* Loan status (e.g., unknown, yes) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loan status */,
  "average_loan_amount" REAL /* Average loan amount for the loan status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "months" (
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each month */,
  "month_name" TEXT /* Name of the month (e.g., aug, dec) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the month */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("month_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "days_of_week" (
  "day_of_week_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each day of week */,
  "day_of_week_name" TEXT /* Name of the day of week (e.g., mon, thu) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the day of the week */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("day_of_week_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poutcomes" (
  "poutcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each previous outcome */,
  "poutcome_name" TEXT /* Name of the previous outcome (e.g., nonexistent, success) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the previous outcome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("poutcome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, marketing team, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
